creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
The new riot client has been released today. I've quickly tested cross-signing with py-matrix-synapse 1.12.4 and things work fine, so we should probably go ahead with this update.

Port builds and runs perfectly fine, testsuit passes too.

According to the release notes[1], the update is a bugfix release (or as close to a bugfix release as py-matrix-synapse is ever going to get). I've confirmed with upstream that the changes in this release are necessary for the cross-signing feature within riot and other clients to work. Should we MFH this?

Cheers,
Sascha

[1] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v1.12.4
